creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Please get more information in the ticket, like the hardware you are 
using, the moment the problem appears, do you also have this problem 
with sa cd like PC-BSD or FreeSBIE? (based on FreeBSD as well) etc. The 
information you are currently showing is just too little to get 
something fixed at all.
